cases.description: First-time OAuth setup triggers the skill
cases.prompt: walk me through setting up GitHub OAuth for our app — I've never done this before
expectations: Builds a task list via TaskCreate before executing
Presents the full plan with agent-vs-user responsibility split before starting
Executes one step at a time through the 7-phase protocol
Documents each completed step via codi-step-documenter

cases.description: Cloud infrastructure setup triggers the skill
cases.prompt: guide me step by step through provisioning our first AWS RDS instance
expectations: Identifies which steps require user action (credentials, AWS console) vs agent action (IaC files, scripts)
Waits for user confirmation after each user-action step
Runs codi-evidence-gathering + codi-verification to validate each step

cases.description: CI/CD pipeline setup triggers the skill
cases.prompt: help me configure a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline from scratch
expectations: Writes a final workflow summary README.md linking all step docs

cases.description: Pure code changes do NOT trigger guided-execution
cases.prompt: implement the user authentication feature per our spec
expectations: Routes to codi-plan-executor or codi-subagent-dev instead
Does NOT produce per-step execution docs

cases.description: Audit findings batch does NOT trigger guided-execution
cases.prompt: work through these 15 security audit findings one by one
expectations: Does NOT produce step docs in docs/executions/
